ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the data was recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the weather data was recorded */,
  "high_temp" INTEGER /* High temperature for the day */,
  "low_temp" INTEGER /* Low temperature for the day */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from a reference point */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state of the city */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the alert is issued */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of weather event (e.g., storm, flood) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event and recommended actions */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the alert period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the alert period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the client */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client accessing the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., forecast, historical) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_access_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_access_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
